mapper.select: SELECT state_id as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM cart GROUP BY state_id

select count(*) from cart WHERE state_id = 'ABANDONED'
AND customer_id = #{userId}

select count(*) from cart WHERE state_id = 'EXPIRED'
AND customer_id = #{userId}

select count(*) from cart WHERE customer_id = #{userId}
AND state_id = #{stateId}

SELECT id, customer_id as "userId", session_id as "sessionId", subtotal, currency, coupon_codes as "couponCodes", discount_amount as "discountAmount", total, state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM cart WHERE customer_id = #{userId} AND state_id = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY last_modified_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT c.id FROM cart c INNER JOIN cart_item ci ON ci.cart_id = c.id WHERE ci.variant_id = #{variantId} AND c.state_id IN ('ACTIVE', 'CHECKOUT_INITIATED')
SELECT id FROM cart WHERE coupon_codes LIKE CONCAT('%', #{couponCode}, '%') AND state_id IN ('ACTIVE', 'CHECKOUT_INITIATED')
SELECT id FROM cart WHERE expires_at < NOW() AND state_id IN ('ACTIVE', 'ABANDONED', 'CHECKOUT_INITIATED')
SELECT id FROM cart WHERE state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND last_modified_time < (NOW() - INTERVAL #{thresholdHours} HOUR)
select count(*) from cart_item WHERE cart_id = #{cartId}

SELECT id, cart_id as "cartId", product_id as "productId", variant_id as "variantId", sku, product_name as "productName", supplier_id as "supplierId", quantity, unit_price as "unitPrice", line_total as "lineTotal", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime", tenant FROM cart_item WHERE cart_id = #{cartId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT c.id as "cartId", c.customer_id as "userId", c.session_id as "sessionId", c.subtotal as "subtotal", c.currency as "currency", c.coupon_codes as "couponCodes", c.discount_amount as "discountAmount", c.total as "total", c.expires_at as "expiresAt", c.notes as "notes", c.description as "description", c.state_id as "stateId", c.flow_id as "flowId", c.created_time as "cartCreatedTime", c.last_modified_time as "cartLastModifiedTime", c.last_modified_by as "lastModifiedBy", c.created_by as "createdBy", c.tenant as "tenant", c.version as "version", c.state_entry_time as "stateEntryTime", ci.id as "itemId", ci.product_id as "productId", ci.variant_id as "variantId", ci.sku as "sku", ci.product_name as "productName", ci.supplier_id as "supplierId", ci.quantity as "quantity", ci.unit_price as "unitPrice", ci.line_total as "lineTotal", ci.created_time as "itemCreatedTime", ci.last_modified_time as "itemLastModifiedTime" FROM cart c LEFT JOIN cart_item ci ON ci.cart_id = c.id WHERE c.id = #{cartId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM cart_activity_log WHERE cart_id = #{cartId}

SELECT a.id as "id", a.cart_id as "cartId", a.activity_name as "activityName", a.activity_success as "activitySuccess", a.activity_comment as "activityComment", a.created_time as "createdTime", a.created_by as "createdBy" FROM cart_activity_log a WHERE a.cart_id = #{cartId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM cart c LEFT JOIN cart_item ci ON ci.cart_id = c.id LEFT JOIN cart_activity_log al ON al.cart_id = c.id WHERE c.id = #{cartId}

SELECT c.id as "cartId", c.customer_id as "userId", c.session_id as "sessionId", c.subtotal as "subtotal", c.currency as "currency", c.coupon_codes as "couponCodes", c.discount_amount as "discountAmount", c.total as "total", c.expires_at as "expiresAt", c.notes as "notes", c.description as "description", c.state_id as "stateId", c.flow_id as "flowId", c.created_time as "cartCreatedTime", c.last_modified_time as "cartLastModifiedTime", c.last_modified_by as "lastModifiedBy", c.created_by as "createdBy", c.tenant as "tenant", c.version as "version", c.state_entry_time as "stateEntryTime", c.sla_yellow_date as "slaYellowDate", c.sla_red_date as "slaRedDate", c.sla_tending_late as "slaTendingLate", c.sla_late as "slaLate", ci.id as "itemId", ci.product_id as "productId", ci.variant_id as "variantId", ci.sku as "sku", ci.product_name as "productName", ci.supplier_id as "supplierId", ci.quantity as "quantity", ci.unit_price as "unitPrice", ci.line_total as "lineTotal", ci.created_time as "itemCreatedTime", ci.last_modified_time as "itemLastModifiedTime", al.id as "activityId", al.activity_name as "activityName", al.activity_success as "activitySuccess", al.activity_comment as "activityComment", al.created_time as "activityCreatedTime" FROM cart c LEFT JOIN cart_item ci ON ci.cart_id = c.id LEFT JOIN cart_activity_log al ON al.cart_id = c.id WHERE c.id = #{cartId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM cart c INNER JOIN cart_item ci ON ci.cart_id = c.id WHERE c.customer_id = #{userId} AND c.state_id IN ('ACTIVE', 'CHECKOUT_INITIATED')

SELECT c.id as "cartId", c.customer_id as "userId", c.subtotal as "subtotal", c.currency as "currency", c.coupon_codes as "couponCodes", c.discount_amount as "discountAmount", c.total as "total", c.state_id as "stateId",
ci.id as "itemId", ci.variant_id as "variantId", ci.product_id as "productId", ci.sku as "sku", ci.quantity as "quantity", ci.unit_price as "unitPrice", ci.line_total as "lineTotal",
p.name as "productName", p.brand as "brand", p.slug as "productSlug", cat.name as "categoryName",
va_color.attribute_value as "variantColor", va_size.attribute_value as "variantSize",
COALESCE(vma.cdn_url, vma.original_url, pma.cdn_url, pma.original_url) as "imageUrl",
inv.available_quantity as "availableQuantity", inv.status as "stockStatus"
FROM cart c INNER JOIN cart_item ci ON ci.cart_id = c.id LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = ci.product_id LEFT JOIN categories cat ON cat.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN variant_attributes va_color ON va_color.variant_id = ci.variant_id AND va_color.attribute_key = 'color' LEFT JOIN variant_attributes va_size ON va_size.variant_id = ci.variant_id AND va_size.attribute_key = 'size' LEFT JOIN variant_media vm ON vm.variant_id = ci.variant_id AND vm.is_primary = true LEFT JOIN media_assets vma ON vma.id = vm.asset_id LEFT JOIN product_media pm ON pm.product_id = ci.product_id AND pm.is_primary = true LEFT JOIN media_assets pma ON pma.id = pm.asset_id LEFT JOIN inventory_item inv ON inv.variant_id = ci.variant_id
WHERE c.id = #{cartId}
ORDER BY ci.created_time ASC ${pagination}
